examples.name: Multiple VRFs with continuation interfaces
examples.input:
Name                             Default RD          Protocols   Interfaces
  gy3                              65201:13            ipv4        Vl13
                                                                   Vl913
                                                                   Vl953
  gy31                             65201:31            ipv4        Vl31
                                                                   Vl931
                                                                   Vl971
  vpn5                             65201:5             ipv4        Vl5
                                                                   Vl905
                                                                   Vl945
  vpn6                             65201:6             ipv4        Lo6
                                                                   Vl6
                                                                   Vl906

examples.name: Live device output
examples.input:
Name                             Default RD            Protocols   Interfaces
  BLUE                             65000:200             ipv4        Lo20
                                                                     Gi2.20
                                                                     Gi3.20
  RED                              65000:100             ipv4        Lo10
                                                                     Gi2.10
                                                                     Gi3.10
  management                       <not set>             ipv4        Gi1

examples.name: VRFs with no interfaces assigned and not-set RD
examples.input:
Name                             Default RD            Protocols   Interfaces
  BLDGMGMT                         172.22.111.32:104
  MANAGEMENT                       172.22.111.32:117     ipv4        Lo0

examples.name: VRFs with mixed protocols including ipv4 and ipv6
examples.input:
Name                             Default RD            Protocols   Interfaces
  OOB-MGMT                         <not set>             ipv4        Gi0/3
  vpn21                            65201:21              ipv4,ipv6   Gi0/0.21
                                                                     Gi0/1.21
  vpn22                            65201:22              ipv4
